summary: Hand-built Algolia catalog client and core catalog commands (search, sync, template, facets, industries, open).
reason: Placeit has no REST catalog API; the catalog is served via a public search-only Algolia key. The generator's spec models only the placeit.net cookie-auth endpoints, so the catalog core is hand-authored on a sibling internal/algolia client with rate limiting.
validated_outcome: search/sync/template/facets/industries verified live against Algolia; sync mirrored 1000 templates into SQLite; full dogfood 70/70.
